title: Graffenrieda denticulata

The family Melastomataceae is a large and diverse group of plants, commonly known as the memecylid or melastome family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues.
